steps.title: Find the head subject
steps.content: The subject is Stephanie Shonekan. The phrase "along with researchers George Starks of Drexel University and Tyron Cooper of Indiana University" adds information but does not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: A, B, and D are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular head subject. The sentence needs the singular verb form that matches Stephanie Shonekan. The answer is C.
